seo.title: The Estate
seo.description: Les Villas Ahlam — a private residential estate of 42 R+1 villas in Bouskoura: concept, contemporary Moroccan architecture and the commitments of developer Yatib Sakan.

header.title: A private estate
header.intro: 42 R+1 villas on serviced lots, in a gated, secure estate in Bouskoura. A haven of calm, fifteen minutes from Mohammed V airport.

concept.paragraph1: Les Villas Ahlam is the choice of the individual villa within a curated setting: a private estate organised into two blocks, streets landscaped with olive trees and bougainvillea, and the privacy of land that is truly your own.
concept.paragraph2: Each lot, from 200 to 461 m², hosts a contemporary R+1 villa. You build the project that reflects you, within a charter that guarantees the estate's harmony.
concept.paragraph3: At the gates of the Bouskoura forest and Bouskoura Golf City, the estate blends nature and city — fresh air on one side, Casablanca twenty minutes on the other.

tadelakt.name: Tadelakt
tadelakt.desc: Lime plaster polished with stone, for interiors bathed in soft, mineral light.

zellige.name: Zellige
zellige.desc: Hand-cut glazed mosaic, as accent touches near entrances and niches.

marble.name: Stone & wood
marble.desc: Local beige stone and warm mashrabiya wood: the noble material of the facades.

vision.paragraph: Habitable flat roofs, large dark-framed bay windows, terraces open to the sky. Les Villas Ahlam are designed for light, the outdoors and family life.

features.ceiling: R+1 villas on lots of 200 to 461 m²

01.title: Serviced lots
01.desc: Roads, water, electricity and sanitation networks completed — you build on ready land.

02.title: Clear legal framework
02.desc: Land Title 23025/63, project led by architect Badik Meriem. Reservation supported by an adviser.

03.title: A harmonious estate
03.desc: An architectural charter guarantees the consistency and value of the entire subdivision.

04.title: Yatib Sakan support
04.desc: From reservation to financing, a single point of contact follows you at every step.
